title: Stale fault baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative freshness-violation case.

steps.description: Publish a payload whose freshness semantics are intended to violate the canonical stale-data assumptions.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the conservative outcome.

notes: The exact stale predicate must be derived from frozen policy and schema assets rather than encoded here.
This skeleton is intended to represent a freshness-violation test class, not a canonical threshold source.
